productDisplayName: Fabindia Women Mustard Chanderi Hand Printed Stole
description: Style Note fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference ethnic garments and fabric.  This stylish stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its Jaipur patterning. The fabric's unique qualities result from the traditional method of sizing and hand weaving developed over the centuries. Twist it into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric on your skin.Product Details Mustard and cream hand printed stoleMaterial and Care Cotton silk Dry clean only
